title: Light Meals
description: Add numerous foods within the vanilla system.
body:
![](https://gitlab.com/hashmod/services/-/raw/main/light-meals/banner.png)

Minecraft has the great potential of expanding its food system using currently available ingredients, yet it does not seem like they are interested in using that, since no foods except the Glow Berries have been added since 1.15. 

Light Meals Mod is intended to change such situation by providing spectacular foods and recipes which Minecraft should have done. 70+ new foods and dishes are craftable simply by a crafting table or furnace and two brand-new cakes can be placed down and eaten just like vanilla ones.

***

**<font color=maroon>Raw and cooked Meats</font>**

![](https://gitlab.com/hashmod/services/-/raw/main/light-meals/raw-cooked-meat.png)

**<font color=brown>Meals</font>**

![](https://gitlab.com/hashmod/services/-/raw/main/light-meals/meals.png)

**<font color=LightCoral>Snacks</font>**

![](https://gitlab.com/hashmod/services/-/raw/main/light-meals/snacks.png)

**<font color=HotPink>Pies and Cakes</font>**

![](https://gitlab.com/hashmod/services/-/raw/main/light-meals/pies-cakes.png)

**<font color=MediumPurple>Soups</font>**

![](https://gitlab.com/hashmod/services/-/raw/main/light-meals/soups.png)

**<font color=CadetBlue>Drinks</font>**

![](https://gitlab.com/hashmod/services/-/raw/main/light-meals/drinks.png)

**And many more!**

***

This Mod is still under development. By leaving suggestion in comments or reporting an issue you can help us improve.

Would you like to have Light Meals translated into your language? Please submit your translation to our [Github Repository](https://github.com/Hashtag233/LightMeals) and this would be a great help.

English is not my first language. Just tell me if I made a mistake.

This is a project for Minecraft forge only and any backport requests will be ignored.

Feel free to put Light Meals into any Modpacks or redistribute it or anything as long as you follow the MIT License.
